meta.title: Air Force Jobs - Battlefield Airmen
meta.description:
Battlefield Airmen are the Special Operations members of the Air Force. They include Combat Controllers, Pararescuemen, Tactical Air Control Party members and Special Operations Weather Technicians.

It involves an intense few weeks of physical training at the beginning of a 2 year course in order to ensure only those with the best mental and physical strength go on to serve. Battlefield Airmen become part of teams involving special forces from all the different branches of the military.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?

Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
